Field.Label: MQTT default credentials are read from IndigoSecrets.py first (MQTT_BROKER / MQTT_PORT / MQTT_USERNAME / MQTT_PASSWORD). Per-device fields override the defaults.
WebSocket Port:
Field.Description: Port the plugin's WS server listens on for live messages.

Field.Label: WS Auth Token:
Field.Description: Required in ?token=… on the WS URL. Blank = use MQTT_EXPLORER_TOKEN from IndigoSecrets.py.

Field.Label: Allow Publish from Web UI:
Field.Description: Uncheck to make the explorer read-only.

Field.Label: WS Coalesce Window (ms):
Field.Description: Updates to the same topic within this window are coalesced before push.
